name: Grit Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. In a saucepan, combine water and butter. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium.
4. Whisk in grits and cook, stirring constantly for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in cheese.
6. Pour grit into the prepared skillet and spread evenly onto sheet pan.
7. Allow to cool and cut into cakes using a 2-1/2-inch to 3-inch biscuit cutter.
8. Dredge both sides of cakes in flour.
9. Pan-fry each cake about 2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
10. Drain on paper towels and keep warm before serving.
Yield: About 8 cakes
